nasb.text: But when Paul had gathered a bundle of sticks and laid them on the fire, a viper came out because of the heat and fastened itself on his hand.

esv.text: When Paul had gathered a bundle of sticks and put them on the fire, a viper came out because of the heat and fastened on his hand.

cnv.text: 保羅拾了一捆乾柴，放在火上的時候，有一條毒蛇，受不住熱，爬了出來，纏住他的手。

ccb.text: 保罗拿起一捆柴放进火堆里，不料有一条毒蛇经不住热钻了出来，咬住了他的手。

csbs.text: 保罗收集了一捆柴火，放在火堆上的时候，有一条毒蛇因热钻了出来，咬住他的手。
